markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on growth initiatives and define a path to break the sign-up plateau.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Sign-up growth has plateaued at \~50–60/week.** The new strategy is to refresh \~1/3 of existing content to recover lost traffic and improve CTR, targeting an extra 5k clicks/month.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [**A Reddit community strategy is launching** to increase brand presence and improve LLM citations. The initial phase is monitoring and manual responses, with plans to scale via 10 new accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [**New OKRs will be set this week** to define a clear path to 500 sign-ups/week. The structure will use input (e.g., content created), intermediary (traffic), and output (sign-ups) metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [**The AUGCLI launch is imminent.** Final code fixes and workflow uploads are expected in 1–2 days, enabling a launch by the end of the week.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)

## Topics

### Growth Plateau & New Content Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Sign-up growth has plateaued at \~50–60/week, driven by slowing SEO traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Performance decline in \~1/3 of published articles (from July/August) due to:](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [**Traffic Loss:** High-converting articles losing rank.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [**Low CTR:** High-impression articles failing to convert.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [**SERP Position Drops:** Early warning signs of further traffic decline.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [**Solution:** Refresh existing content to recover lost traffic and improve CTR.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [**Estimated Impact:** +5,000 clicks/month → +sign-ups.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prioritizing articles with clear performance issues provides faster, more predictable wins than creating new, unproven content.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
      - [**Focus:** Product comparisons require frequent updates to stay current with feature releases (e.g., Cursor, GitHub) and maintain rank.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### Reddit Community Strategy (Geo)

  - [**Goal:** Increase brand presence and improve LLM citations by engaging on Reddit.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [**Phase 1: Monitoring & Manual Responses**](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
      - [Stitching together monitoring tools (e.g., GumiSearch) to track relevant threads (e.g., alternatives, AI tooling questions).](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
      - [**Suggestion:** Expand monitoring to include subreddits like `r/Cursor` and `r/Singularity`.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Scaling Engagement**](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [A process will be developed to scale responses using 10 new Reddit accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [**Future Step:** Seeding posts will follow the initial monitoring and response phase.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)

### LLM & SERP Performance

  - [**Problem:** Augment Code is cited as a source by LLMs but is not included in comparative tables, preventing direct click-throughs.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [**Solution:** The content refresh will optimize articles to improve SERP snippets and secure a spot in these tables.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [**Metric:** Branded search traffic will be the leading indicator for LLM impact, as direct attribution is not possible.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)

### OKR Framework

  - [**Goal:** Define a clear path to 500 sign-ups/week.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [**Core OKR Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [**Objective:** Increase organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [**Key Results:** Track input (e.g., content created), intermediary (traffic), and output (sign-ups) metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [**Experimental OKR:**](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [**Focus:** Test a high-potential initiative, such as the Reddit strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [**Example:** Objective: Dominate Reddit presence. Key Result: Post 100 comments/week. This forces the team to build a scalable process.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)

### AUGCLI Launch

  - [**Status:** Imminent.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Final code fixes and uploading \~40 existing workflows are expected in 1–2 days.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [**Launch:** Target is end of this week, pending a final review from AJ.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)

### Website & ICP Artifacts

  - [**Website:** All code changes are merged; awaiting content for CTAs and TLDR sections.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [**ICP Artifacts:** Revised based on new ICP data from Octave. The Audience Personas document will be shared for review.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
      - [Finalize AUGCLI code fixes and workflow uploads (1–2 days).](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
      - [Share the Audience Personas document for review.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [**Sylvain:**](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [Finalize and share new OKRs by end of week.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [Review AUGCLI once ready for launch.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [**Nathalie:**](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
      - [Execute the content refresh roadmap, starting with high-priority articles.](https://fathom.video/share/PCdE3LxhyXrHaph_8R1yEsyevZeZYjBy?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
